回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 西洋文學概論(一) (Introduction to Western Literature I)	開課班級 : 應英二年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 吳唯邦	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
Introduction to Western Literature provides an inclusive program of study, the knowledge and skills needed to develop the ability to think creatively and appreciate how an author conveys ideas and feelings in a text. This course will introduce students to methods of reading western literary texts in English. Students will learn to analyze the artistic and imaginative use of language. Since literature is a window on culture, the course aims to deepen students’ understanding of people from other cultures and the complexity of life. The majority of this course will depend on your readiness for participation in class. This class is not about rote learning; in this class, we will have discussions grounded in your own thoughts and opinions. To have such discussions, attendance, preparation, and participation are crucial. 


2.教學綱要
*Be able to discuss significant passages in literary works.
*Identify the characteristics of a specific literary genre.
*Analyze the themes in a literary work.
*Think independently about literature.
*Identify literary devices: allusion, irony, metaphor, motif, personification, theme, etc.
*Recognize the function of symbolism and the prevalent archetypes in literary works.

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Class Participation, Discussion, and Presentation 40%; Mid-term Exam: 30%; Final Exam 30% 
This course is not lecture-based. You will need to work as a group to interpret and to understand the weekly reading materials, and to begin to learn how to interpret and apply what you have learned. 
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育、SDG5 性別平權


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：中
